chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-223 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 927/2024 3.For hearing of main case. 26-03-2024 Mr. Raja Shahid Hussain Solangi, Advocate for petitioners. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G and Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G a/w SIP/I.O Abdul Ghafoor of P.S, Bhiria City. SIP-Muhammad Azeem of P.S, Padidan. ***** Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.5. He has also filed objections on behalf of said respondent. Petitioner No.1 Mst Zainab has been produced by Assistant Incharge, Darul Aman, Sukkur. I.O has also produced report of Special Medical Board of GMC, Hospital Sukkur showing that she is aged about 17/18 years. She has made statement that she wants to go with her parents, who are available in Court. She is set at liberty to join her parents. Petition along with listed application, in the above circumstances, is disposed of. I.O shall continue investigation in this matter, but shall not arrest petitioner No.2 and submit report before the Magistrate after completing investigation. The Magistrate concerned after such report is submitted shall pass an appropriate order in accordance with law. The official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioner No.1, as and when she needed. Petitioner No.1 is sent back with directions to Darul Aman authorities to release her after due following formalities. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
